allowed: draft or send bounded low-risk replies
attach policy metadata to support workflows
authority.conflictHandling: When practice and policy diverge, surface the discrepancy and use the last human-approved reconciled rule. If no reconciled rule exists, escalate instead of improvising.

artifactSurfaces.title: Docs policy index
artifactSurfaces.summary: Generated index of canonical policy documents and their machine-readable agent metadata.

artifactSurfaces.title: Website policy summaries
artifactSurfaces.summary: Public website policy-summary feed generated from the canonical docs set.

artifactSurfaces.title: Portal live FAQ schema
artifactSurfaces.summary: Live faqItems collection schema and normalization logic used by the portal support view.

artifactSurfaces.title: Portal FAQ seed recommendations
artifactSurfaces.summary: Recommended faqItems seed data and supportRequests schema documentation.

artifactSurfaces.title: Portal support fallback answers
artifactSurfaces.summary: Fallback support answers used when live faqItems cannot be loaded.

portalFaqFallbackLinks.title: How do pickup and drop-off work?
portalFaqFallbackLinks.summary: Use your portal timeline for status updates. When your pieces are marked ready, you can pick up during normal studio hours.

portalFaqFallbackLinks.title: How can I check kiln timing?
portalFaqFallbackLinks.summary: Open Kiln Schedule and your piece timeline in the portal for the latest estimate. Timing can shift based on queue and load changes.

portalFaqFallbackLinks.title: What should I do about a legacy membership question?
portalFaqFallbackLinks.summary: Membership tiers are decommissioned. Do not route customers to tier changes; escalate legacy membership billing or account-record questions to staff review.

portalFaqFallbackLinks.title: Where can I find billing receipts?
portalFaqFallbackLinks.summary: Go to Billing in the portal for recent charges and invoice details. If you need a specific receipt, submit a support request.

portalFaqFallbackLinks.title: When should I submit a support request?
portalFaqFallbackLinks.summary: Use support requests for non-urgent studio questions and appointment-planning questions. For urgent issues, email support directly so we can respond faster.

portalFaqFallbackLinks.title: How do I keep a copy of my reservation history?
portalFaqFallbackLinks.summary: Open Support and request a continuity export if you need a full JSON or CSV archive.

portalFaqSeedLinks.title: When will my pieces be ready for pickup?
portalFaqSeedLinks.summary: We post updates as each firing completes. Check My Pieces for the latest status and timeline.

portalFaqSeedLinks.title: How do kiln firings get scheduled?
portalFaqSeedLinks.summary: Firings are batched by clay body and kiln availability. Timing can shift.

portalFaqSeedLinks.title: I need billing help or a receipt. What should I do?
portalFaqSeedLinks.summary: Submit a support request with the date, amount, and what you need.

portalFaqSeedLinks.title: What happens to legacy membership questions?
portalFaqSeedLinks.summary: Membership tiers are decommissioned. Send legacy membership billing, refund, or account-record questions to staff review instead of offering plan changes.

portalFaqSeedLinks.title: Can I reserve kiln time from the portal?
portalFaqSeedLinks.summary: Use the form to request a booking or change, and include your clay body, size, and preferred window.

portalFaqSeedLinks.title: What is the shelf-space and storage policy?
portalFaqSeedLinks.summary: Finished work enters a pickup-ready timeline as soon as it is marked ready. Coordinate prepaid storage before billed storage begins.

practiceEvidence.title: Mistaken membership charge followed by refund
practiceEvidence.summary: Customer-facing support verified a mistaken membership charge and confirmed a refund after review.
practiceEvidence.observedPractice: Support corrected the mistaken membership charge and issued a refund after verifying the error.
practiceEvidence.canonicalConcern: Policy now explicitly covers full refunds for paid mistaken charges, no-penalty unpaid cancellations, and prorated review after work starts.

practiceEvidence.title: Firing-damage notice and follow-up
practiceEvidence.summary: Kiln Fire customer notices acknowledge firing issues, document the affected piece, and follow up with next steps.
practiceEvidence.observedPractice: The customer-facing path acknowledges the incident quickly and follows up after staff review.
practiceEvidence.canonicalConcern: The policy now requires documented acknowledgment and a review path for customer-facing damage reports while keeping remedies human-reviewed and non-promissory.

practiceEvidence.title: Reservation cleanup and reschedule behavior
practiceEvidence.summary: Customer conversations show manual cleanup and reschedule coordination when reservation plans change.
practiceEvidence.observedPractice: Support coordinates revised dates and cleanup behavior manually instead of promising automatic schedule changes.
practiceEvidence.canonicalConcern: Policy now states that pre-load changes are no-penalty, staged or loaded changes are best-effort only, and deadline requests require staff confirmation.

practiceEvidence.title: Pickup and storage timing reminders
practiceEvidence.summary: Reminder sequences and pickup coordination are already part of customer-facing Kiln Fire communication.
practiceEvidence.observedPractice: Support sends reminder-style communication before storage deadlines and coordinates pickup timing.
practiceEvidence.canonicalConcern: Current storage policy broadly aligns with the reminder behavior and fee timeline.
